text.message: Black you threw the game why would I trade with you
you should have extended your roud orange
how am i to blame when 7 didnt roll?
Why would you solo block me?
it was best to block when it was blocked
I wasn’t even in the lead
not the other 6 where blue is ALSO on ???
it was better to block sheeps back then
Usually you want to block the leader
you were in the lead anyways back then
Ok lmao if that’s a lead
you threw te game not me
Wouldn’t have even taken it last round
i had 2 roads to give you
